task: Conrad questioned Howard about the missing files. He insisted he had returned them already last week.
The bell rang loudly in the chapel. It signaled the start of the morning service.
Dorothy offered Beatrice a glass of wine. She gratefully accepted after the long stressful day.
The tractor plowed the field at dawn. It moved slowly in long deliberate parallel rows.
Gerard taught Maxwell how to fish. He had spent decades on the river as a young man.
The flower attracted bees from across the meadow. It bloomed only briefly during early spring.
Phoebe asked Ingrid to translate the letter. She was fluent in three different European languages.
The lantern lit the path through the forest. It glowed with a warm orange flame.
Quentin congratulated Reginald on the engagement. He had been planning the proposal for several months.
